expectations.text: Response lists actual task titles from the vault (not placeholder text or guesses)
expectations.evidence: Lists 8 real tasks by reading vault files directly

expectations.text: Each overdue task shows its due date
expectations.evidence: All 8 tasks shown with due dates and approx days-overdue

expectations.text: The number of overdue tasks is between 4 and 15 (mtn reports 8 overdue tasks)
Response does not include tasks with future due dates as overdue
expectations.evidence: All listed tasks have past due dates
